---
title: "Tyler Lowry"
---

# DATA SCIENTIST

:::{.columns .gx-5}
:::{.column width="60%" .px-4}
I'm a first-year Data Science MS student at Texas A&M, where I'm doing graduate research on 3D spatial transcriptomics — building GPU-accelerated pipelines to analyze 43M-cell MERFISH datasets. Before grad school, I worked as an ML engineer building production forecasting systems, where I learned to care as much about the math being correct as the code running fast.

My background sits at the intersection of statistics, machine learning, and business. I paired a Data Science degree with an Accounting minor in undergrad, and that combination shapes how I approach problems. I'm most interested in applying rigorous statistical methods to real decisions in finance, operations, and anywhere messy data hides useful signal.
:::

:::{.column width="40%" .px-4}
![](profile_pic.jpeg)
:::
:::

## Skills

:::{.columns .gx-5}
:::{.column width="50%" .px-4}
### Programming Languages
- Python, R, SQL
- TypeScript, JavaScript
- PHP, C#, HTML/CSS

### Machine Learning & Statistics
- TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, PyTorch
- Pandas, Polars, NumPy, PySpark
- R Tidyverse
- Statistical Modeling & Analysis
:::

:::{.column width="50%" .px-4}
### Data Visualization & BI
- Tableau, Power BI
- ggplot2, Plotly, Seaborn
- Interactive Dashboards

### Cloud & Development
- AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda), Databricks
- Docker, Git
- REST APIs, React, Node.js
- Database Design & Optimization
:::
:::
